form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 400m at Warragul beaten 1.3 lengths (23.35) behind Maudie Rose in a Mix 6/7 on April 14. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th on April 3 over 400m at Geelong behind Big Boy Pants beaten 23 lengths (24.31) in a Mix 6/7. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Resumes from a four months spell and was in the minors at only other fresh up run, finishing second over 300m at this track. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by half a length at this track over 300m (17.12) beating Guardian in Bottom Up - Grade 7 on April 8. Holds top-three claims.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 300m at this track in a handy (17.16), beating Berringa Black. Racing well and can win again.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 300m at this track beaten half a length (17.14) behind Be Lively in a Bottom Up - Grade 7 on April 8. Has ability and worth including.
